languages.text: "Отмечено особое внимание Лорда-капитана к священному распределению благословенных технологий аугментации. Вдумчивая установка позволила сохранить для вас это". {n}Из-под алой робы генетора появляется изящного вида имплант.{/n} "Статус жизнеформы "Лорд-капитан" позволит данной технологии служить вам максимально эффективно".

"The Lord Captain's special attention to the sacred distribution of blessed augmentation technologies has been registered. This has been preserved for you as a result of judicious installation decisions." {n}A sleek-looking implant appears from beneath the Genetor's crimson robe.{/n} "The Lord Captain life form's status will allow this technology to serve you with maximum efficiency."
languages.original_text: "Отмечено особое внимание Лорда-капитана к священному распределению благословенных технологий аугментации. Вдумчивая установка позволила сохранить для вас это". {n}Из-под алой робы генетора появляется изящного вида имплант.{/n} "Статус жизнеформы "Лорд-капитан" позволит данной технологии служить вам максимально эффективно".

languages.text: "Die besondere Aufmerksamkeit des Lord Captains auf die heilige Verteilung gesegneter Augmentationstechnologien wurde registriert. Das hier dient der Würdigung Eurer umsichtigen Installationsentscheidungen." {n}Der Genetor holt ein elegant wirkendes Implantat aus seiner roten Robe.{/n} "Der Status der Einheit Lord Captain wird dieser Technologie ermöglichen, Euch mit maximaler Effizienz zu dienen."
languages.original_text: "The Lord Captain's special attention to the sacred distribution of blessed augmentation technologies has been registered. This has been preserved for you as a result of judicious installation decisions." {n}A sleek-looking implant appears from beneath the Genetor's crimson robe.{/n} "The Lord Captain life form's status will allow this technology to serve you with maximum efficiency."

traits.locale_text: "Die besondere Aufmerksamkeit des Lord Captains auf die heilige Verteilung gesegneter Augmentationstechnologien wurde registriert. Das hier dient der Würdigung Eurer umsichtigen Installationsentscheidungen. {n}Der Genetor holt ein elegant wirkendes Implantat aus seiner roten Robe.{/n} "Der Status der Einheit Lord Captain wird dieser Technologie ermöglichen, Euch mit maximaler Effizienz zu dienen."

languages.text: « L'attention particulière portée par {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine} à la distribution sacrée des saintes technologies augmentatives a été dûment enregistrée. Cet augmétique a été mis de côté à votre intention en considération de décisions structurelles judicieuses. » {n}Le genetor sort de sous sa robe écarlate un implant à l'esthétique raffinée.{/n} « Le statut de l'unité {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} permettra à cette technologie de vous servir avec une efficacité optimale. »
languages.original_text: "The Lord Captain's special attention to the sacred distribution of blessed augmentation technologies has been registered. This has been preserved for you as a result of judicious installation decisions." {n}A sleek-looking implant appears from beneath the Genetor's crimson robe.{/n} "The Lord Captain life form's status will allow this technology to serve you with maximum efficiency."

traits.locale_text: « L'attention particulière portée par {mf|le seigneur-capitaine|la seigneure-capitaine} à la distribution sacrée des saintes technologies augmentatives a été dûment enregistrée. Cet augmétique a été mis de côté à votre intention en considération de décisions structurelles judicieuses. » {n}Le genetor sort de sous sa robe écarlate un implant à l'esthétique raffinée.{/n} « Le statut de l'unité {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine} permettra à cette technologie de vous servir avec une efficacité optimale. »

languages.text: “舰长大人对神圣植入技术分配的特别关注已被记录。由于明智的安装决策，此物得以为您特别保留。”{n}一个流线型的植入物从基因士的绯红长袍下显露出来。{/n}“以舰长大人您的权限等级，这项技术将能以最高效率为您服务。”
languages.original_text: "The Lord Captain's special attention to the sacred distribution of blessed augmentation technologies has been registered. This has been preserved for you as a result of judicious installation decisions." {n}A sleek-looking implant appears from beneath the Genetor's crimson robe.{/n} "The Lord Captain life form's status will allow this technology to serve you with maximum efficiency."

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人对神圣植入技术分配的特别关注已被记录。由于明智的安装决策，此物得以为您特别保留。”{n}一个流线型的植入物从基因士的绯红长袍下显露出来。{/n}“以舰长大人您的权限等级，这项技术将能以最高效率为您服务。”

languages.text: «El especial interés de{mf|l| la} Lord Capitán por la sagrada distribución de tecnologías de aumento bendecidas queda registrado. Como resultado de la eficacia de sus decisiones de instalación, hemos conservado esto para usted». {n}Un implante de aspecto elegante aparece del interior de la túnica escarlata del genetor.{/n} «El estatus de la unidad Lord Capitán le permitirá aprovechar al máximo esta tecnología».
languages.original_text: "The Lord Captain's special attention to the sacred distribution of blessed augmentation technologies has been registered. This has been preserved for you as a result of judicious installation decisions." {n}A sleek-looking implant appears from beneath the Genetor's crimson robe.{/n} "The Lord Captain life form's status will allow this technology to serve you with maximum efficiency."

traits.locale_text: «El especial interés de{mf|l| la} Lord Capitán por la sagrada distribución de tecnologías de aumento bendecidas queda registrado. Como resultado de la eficacia de sus decisiones de instalación, hemos conservado esto para usted». {n}Un implante de aspecto elegante aparece del interior de la túnica escarlata del genetor.{/n} «El estatus de la unidad Lord Capitán le permitirá aprovechar al máximo esta tecnología».

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan'ın kutsal ogmentasyon teknolojilerinin kutsal dağılımına gösterdiği özel ilgi kaydedildi. Bu, mantıklı kurulum kararlarının bir sonucu olarak sizin için korundu." {n}Genetör'ün kızıl cübbesinin altından şık görünümlü bir implant çıkıyor.{/n} "Lord Kaptan biriminin statüsü, bu teknolojinin size azami verimlilikle hizmet etmesini sağlayacak."
languages.original_text: "The Lord Captain's special attention to the sacred distribution of blessed augmentation technologies has been registered. This has been preserved for you as a result of judicious installation decisions." {n}A sleek-looking implant appears from beneath the Genetor's crimson robe.{/n} "The Lord Captain life form's status will allow this technology to serve you with maximum efficiency."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Kaptan'ın kutsal ogmentasyon teknolojilerinin kutsal dağılımına gösterdiği özel ilgi kaydedildi. Bu, mantıklı kurulum kararlarının bir sonucu olarak sizin için korundu." {n}Genetör'ün kızıl cübbesinin altından şık görünümlü bir implant çıkıyor.{/n} "Lord Kaptan biriminin statüsü, bu teknolojinin size azami verimlilikle hizmet etmesini sağlayacak."

languages.text: 「聖なる増幅技術の分配に、大隊長が特別な注意を払っていることが記録されました。これは、賢明な設置決定の結果、あなたのために保存されました」{n}ジェネーターの赤いローブの下から、スタイリッシュなインプラントが現れます。{/n}「大隊長ユニットのステータスにより、この技術は最大限の効率であなたに奉仕することができます」
languages.original_text: "The Lord Captain's special attention to the sacred distribution of blessed augmentation technologies has been registered. This has been preserved for you as a result of judicious installation decisions." {n}A sleek-looking implant appears from beneath the Genetor's crimson robe.{/n} "The Lord Captain life form's status will allow this technology to serve you with maximum efficiency."

traits.locale_text: 「聖なる増幅技術の分配に、大隊長が特別な注意を払っていることが記録されました。これは、賢明な設置決定の結果、あなたのために保存されました」{n}ジェネーターの赤いローブの下から、スタイリッシュなインプラントが現れます。{/n}「大隊長ユニットのステータスにより、この技術は最大限の効率であなたに奉仕することができます」
